---
title: "讲义与笔记 Notes"
description: "公开的课程笔记、专题讲义与综述性材料。"
page-layout: full
toc: false
css: assets/home.css
listing:
  contents: data/notes.yml
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [title, description, course, status, version, date, categories]
  field-display-names:
    title: TITLE / 标题
    description: ABSTRACT
    course: COURSE / 主题
    status: STATUS
    version: VER.
    date: UPDATED
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: [date, title]
  filter-ui: [title, course, status, categories]
  page-size: 12
---

::: {.page-hero .notes-page-hero}
::: {.page-code}
02 / NOTE ARCHIVE
:::

# 讲义与笔记

<p class="page-lead">公开的课程笔记、专题讲义与综述性材料。它们是学习过程中的版本化记录，而不是终稿的陈列柜。</p>

::: {.archive-stats aria-label="讲义归档说明"}
::: {.archive-stat}
<span>FORMAT</span><strong>PDF / WEB</strong>
:::
::: {.archive-stat}
<span>VERSIONED</span><strong>YES</strong>
:::
::: {.archive-stat}
<span>ERRORS</span><strong>WELCOME</strong>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.archive-notice}
除特别说明外，这些内容均为个人学习资料，可能持续修订，不代表课程、教师或院系的官方材料。如发现错误，欢迎指正。
:::
